nasb.text: Stand firm therefore, having girded your loins with truth, and having put on the breastplate of righteousness,

esv.text: Stand therefore, having fastened on the belt of truth, and having put on the breastplate of righteousness,

cnv.text: 因此，你們要站穩，用真理當帶子束腰，披上公義的胸甲，

ccb.text: 务要站稳，用真理当作带子束腰，以公义当作护心镜遮胸，

csbs.text: 所以，你们要站立得住： 用真理束上腰，穿上公义的护胸甲；
